message:
fix: address search indexing, timer leak, year hardcode, a11y, and MDX field precedence

Strip HTML tags from search index content so embedded HTML in MDX
posts doesn't pollute search results with raw markup. Fix a timer
leak in the TL;DR clipboard copy handler where rapid re-clicks would
spawn orphaned timeouts — now clears the previous timeout before
setting a new one. Replace the hardcoded "2025" in the Konami Code
easter egg with dynamic `new Date().getFullYear()` so it stays
current. Add focus-visible ring styles to the X stats card for
keyboard accessibility. Reorder MDX frontmatter spread so that
explicit fields (slug, title, date, excerpt) properly override
arbitrary frontmatter data instead of being overwritten by it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,7 +93,7 @@ export default function EasterEggs() { You found the easter egg!

- The Konami Code still works in 2025 + The Konami Code still works in {new Date().getFullYear()}

Click anywhere to dismiss
